notif.title: Recording run
notif.body: Tap to return to Running Coach

discardConfirm: Discard this run? Your tracked route will be lost.
routeUploadFailed: Couldn't upload the route — saved on this device, will retry syncing.

hr.postRun: Heart rate is added from {{store}} after you finish.

gps.accuracyGood: GPS accuracy ±{{acc}} m — good to go
gps.accuracyWait: GPS accuracy ±{{acc}} m — wait for it to settle for a cleaner start

keepScreenOn: Keep this screen on while running — browsers can't track in the background, so it pauses if the screen locks. A native app version tracks with the screen off (less battery).

hrNudge.authBody: Health Connect is selected, but this phone has not granted access yet. Authorize it in Settings to add heart rate after runs.
hrNudge.hkAuthBody: Apple Health is selected, but this phone has not granted access yet. Authorize it in Settings to add heart rate after runs.
hrNudge.pairBody: Bluetooth heart-rate capture is selected, but no sensor is paired on this phone. Pair one in Settings to record live BPM.
hrNudge.setupBody: Connect a Bluetooth sensor or Health Connect to capture heart rate automatically — no need to type it in. You can set this up later in Settings.
hrNudge.betaWarning: This capture feature is new and can break. Please check saved readings before using them for training decisions.

errors.permissionDeniedNative: Location is needed to record your run. Make sure Location is turned on for this device and allow access (“While using the app”) for this app, then try again.
errors.permissionDeniedWeb: Location permission denied. Enable it for this site in your browser settings, then try again.
errors.noFix: Couldn't get a GPS fix. Make sure location is on and you're outdoors.
errors.timeout: GPS is taking too long to respond. Trying again…
errors.unsupported: This browser/device doesn't support GPS (geolocation). Geolocation also needs a secure (https) connection.
errors.requestFailed: Couldn't request location permission. Please try again.

map.noKey: Map tiles need VITE_MAPTILER_KEY — route still records.

hrTarget.addProfile: Add your HR profile in Settings to see a target zone
